overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from a Western-themed video game showing an injured character crawling up from muddy ground and walking through a rainy night in an old wooden frontier town. The scene features atmospheric lighting from gas lamps and candles, with detailed wooden architecture and wet, reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow muddy courtyard between wooden buildings

events.description: injured character pushes themselves up from the muddy ground to a sitting position
character stands up and begins walking forward through the courtyard

agents.ego_description: injured character recovering from prone position on the ground and beginning to walk through the rainy courtyard

cast iron street lamp with warm glowing light

weathered wooden picket fence

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow muddy courtyard between wooden frontier buildings at night. An injured character lies on the wet ground in heavy rain, pushes themselves up to sitting, then stands and begins walking. Warm light from a gas lamp post illuminates the area, reflecting off the muddy puddles.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between wooden buildings with arched doorways

events.description: character approaches and begins ascending wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley between buildings and climbing wooden stairs

entered.detail: series of arched doorways in the stone building facade
steep wooden staircase with simple railings leading upward
close wooden plank wall of adjacent building
wall-mounted gas lantern casting warm light
planks of wood leaning against the wall
simple wooden handrail along the staircase
wooden balcony on the upper floor of the building

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow enclosed passage between wooden buildings, passing arched doorways and weathered walls. The space is dimly lit by wall-mounted lanterns. The character approaches and begins climbing a steep wooden staircase leading to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with wooden cart and muddy ground

events.description: character reaches top of stairs and enters more open courtyard area
character walks past wooden cart and continues through the open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through open courtyard passing wooden cart and barrels in the rain

entered.detail: old wooden wagon with large wheels sitting in the courtyard
stack of wooden barrels against the building
two-story wooden building with shuttered windows
building with arched openings on the ground floor
wooden tables and chairs arranged in the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the character enters a more open courtyard exposed to the heavy rain. A wooden cart sits in the center surrounded by barrels. The space opens up to show multiple two-story wooden buildings with balconies, and the sky is partially visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with outdoor seating and external staircases

events.description: character passes outdoor seating area with candle-lit tables

agents.ego_description: walking through main courtyard with tables and chairs, approaching external staircases on the buildings

entered.detail: wooden dining table with items on it
wooden chairs around the table
lantern with candle providing warm light on the table
external wooden staircase leading to upper floor
stacked wooden crates and boxes
wooden door with metal bars
piles of wooden boxes and crates

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the open courtyard, passing an outdoor seating area with wooden tables and chairs illuminated by candle lanterns. External wooden staircases lead up the building facades, and stacks of wooden crates are scattered around the muddy ground as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a claustrophobic, muddy alleyway and gradually expands into a wider, rain-drenched frontier courtyard. It begins with an injured character pushing themselves up from the wet ground under the warm glow of a gas lamp, before they begin walking through the heavy rain. As the character moves forward, the scene narrows into a dimly lit passage of weathered walls and arched doorways, leading the camera up a steep wooden staircase. The environment then opens up as the character emerges from the passage into a larger courtyard featuring a wooden cart, barrels, and multi-story buildings with balconies. Finally, the camera glides past candle-lit outdoor seating and scattered crates, revealing the full scale of the wooden architecture under the persistent downpour.
